title: Action Bar Coordinates
description: This is a simple  mod for the Fabric Loader that displays your current position in the action bar (toggleable via keybind).
body:
⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

<hr>

**Mod Description**

**Action Bar Coordinates** is a simple client-sided only mod for the **Fabric Loader**, that allows you to view your current **X**, **Y**, and **Z** coordinates (_also_ allows you to see the **direction you are facing**: North, South, East, West, as of version 1.0.1) in Minecraft's **Action Bar** (toggleable, key-binding key set to **UNBOUND** by default). Every time you toggle the mod, a sound will play (_minecraft:block.dispenser.fail_), and a client-sided message will appear, notifying you about the mod's state of operation. For a visual of this mod, please check out this mod's **Gallery Tab**, or play the **Mod Demonstration Video** below.

<hr>

**Mod Demonstration Video**
